WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: How is WhatsApp Business API connected?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: Use Hermes Agent (open-source) at client site instead of direct WhatsApp Business API. QR code WhatsApp Web — no Business account needed.

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: SMS: GSM modem or cloud gateway?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: Support both. GSM modem primary (Huawei E3372 ~20€), cloud gateway as optional fallback. Client chooses in dashboard.

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: No-channel fallback when internet + SMS down?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: Queue alerts locally. Retry when connection restores.

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: Who pays WhatsApp costs?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: Included in VISION license. VaultOS pays (one central Meta/WhatsApp account via Hermes, absorbing cost in license price).

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: Where is Hermes Agent deployed?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: At client site, inside their Docker Compose alongside vault-os.

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: Does Hermes replace SMS too?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: No. Hermes for WhatsApp + Telegram. GSM modem for SMS (offline-capable and resilient).
options_presented: Hermes pour chat, GSM modem pour SMS

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: Hermes WhatsApp connection method?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: QR code WhatsApp Web (no Business API). Client scans QR on first setup.

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: Telegram priority?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: Optional — client chooses. WhatsApp is primary.

WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.question: Document Hermes + modem decision?
WhatsApp & SMS alert channels.answer: Yes, document this decision as a technical note/ADR.
